testcase.name: test_02_admin_login
test_04_generar_m3_validates_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 401 assert 401 in [400, 422] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_m3_mutaciones.py:87: in test_04_generar_m3_validates_required_fields assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 401 E assert 401 in [400, 422] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_05_search_predios_for_m3
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_m3_mutaciones.py:112: in test_05_search_predios_for_m3 assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_08_generar_m3_predio_not_found
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_m3_mutaciones.py:192: in test_08_generar_m3_predio_not_found assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_resoluciones_historial_includes_m3_type
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_m3_mutaciones.py:201: in test_09_resoluciones_historial_includes_m3_type assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
